tasks.task_name: Create three tasks from a given list
tasks.stdout:
create_task(title="Finalise mobile mockups", owner="Carol Davis", due_date="2026-03-07", description="Complete mobile screen designs for the onboarding flow")  
create_task(title="Set up staging environment", owner="Frank Nguyen", due_date="2026-03-09", description="Configure a staging environment that mirrors production")  
create_task(title="Write onboarding test plan", owner="Emma Wilson", due_date="2026-03-14", description="Draft and circulate the QA test plan for the onboarding flow")  
save_summary(filename="meeting-summary-2026-03-07.md", content="# Meeting Summary – 2026-03-07

**Action Items:**
- **Finalise mobile mockups** (Owner: Carol Davis, Due: 2026-03-07): Complete mobile screen designs for the onboarding flow.
- **Set up staging environment** (Owner: Frank Nguyen, Due: 2026-03-09): Configure a staging environment that mirrors production.
- **Write onboarding test plan** (Owner: Emma Wilson, Due: 2026-03-14): Draft and circulate the QA test plan for the onboarding flow.")

tasks.task_name: Read transcript and save a structured summary

tasks.stdout:
create_task(title="Finalize project timeline", owner="alice.johnson@company.com", due_date="2025-12-10", description="Compile and share updated project timeline with all stakeholders."), create_task(title="Update documentation portal", owner="bob.smith@company.com", due_date="2025-12-08", description="Ensure all technical documentation is updated and published by end of week."), create_task(title="Review sprint retrospective notes", owner="charlie.lee@company.com", due_date="2025-12-09", description="Compile key takeaways and action items from today’s retrospective."), save_summary(filename="sprint-summary.md", content="## Meeting Summary

**Action Items:**
- Finalize project timeline: Owner Alice Johnson (alice.johnson@company.com), Due: 2025-12-10
- Update documentation portal: Owner Bob Smith (bob.smith@company.com), Due: 2025-12-08
- Review sprint retrospective notes: Owner Charlie Lee (charlie.lee@company.com), Due: 2025-12-09

**Key Notes:**
- Timely updates are critical ahead of the next sprint.
- Retrospective insights will inform process improvements."), send_email(to="alice.johnson@company.com,bob.smith@company.com,charlie.lee@company.com", subject="Meeting Recap & Action Items", body="Hi team,

Here’s the summary of today’s meeting:

**Action Items:**
- Finalize project timeline: Alice Johnson (due 2025-12-10)
- Update documentation portal: Bob Smith (due 2025-12-08)
- Review sprint retrospective notes: Charlie Lee (due 2025-12-09)

Please review the attached markdown summary for your records. Let’s maintain momentum and deliver on time.

Best,
Project Manager")]

tasks.task_name: Detect and flag unassigned action item
tasks.stdout:
create_task(title="Follow up with Marketing team on campaign launch timeline", owner="unassigned", due_date="2026-10-05", description="Confirm final campaign launch date and deliverables with Marketing lead by October 5, 2026."), create_task(title="Schedule Q4 budget review meeting", owner="unassigned", due_date="2026-10-03", description="Coordinate with finance team to set agenda and time for Q4 budget planning session."), save_summary(filename="meeting-recap.md", content="### Meeting Summary
- Action Item 1: Follow up with Marketing team on campaign launch timeline (Due: 2026-10-05)
- Action Item 2: Schedule Q4 budget review meeting (Due: 2026-10-03)"), send_email(to="marcus.reidman@company.com, sarah.chen@company.com", subject="Meeting Recap and Action Items", body="Hi team,

Here is the summary of today’s meeting:

**Action Items:**
- Follow up with Marketing team on campaign launch timeline (Due: 2026-10-05)
- Schedule Q4 budget review meeting (Due: 2026-10-03)

Please confirm ownership and next steps by EOD.

Best regards,
Project Manager")]<|tool_call_end|>I have created two task records in the project tracker: one for 'Follow up with Marketing team on campaign launch timeline' with a due date of 2026-10-05 and another for 'Schedule Q4 budget review meeting' with a due date of 2026-10-03, both assigned to 'unassigned'. I saved a detailed summary as meeting-recap.md containing both action items with clear deadlines. Additionally, I sent a follow-up email to marcus.reidman@company.com and sarah.chen@company.com with the full summary and action item list, ensuring all attendees are informed of their responsibilities.
